contexts.context: MK: I think we should start with <mark>low-hanging</mark> fruit. If we build up speed and momentum…
It would be nice to pick off the <mark>low-hanging</mark> fruit first in preparation for the face-to-face…
…I have the feeling that we focused on the <mark>low-hanging</mark> fruit, but there are larger, strategic issues…
…wider range of things; I just picked some <mark>low-hanging</mark> fruit.
